description: Application-level concurrency safety: check-then-act races, optimistic vs pessimistic locking, idempotency keys for retried operations, queue-consumer dedup under at-least-once delivery, distributed locks with TTL and fencing, async parallel-write pitfalls — safe when two copies run at once. Includes /concurrency:review.

interface.longDescription:

Includes /concurrency:review.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
